May launch cost

The problem

You want influencer marketing.
But the options don't work.

Small fashion brands keep running into the same three dead ends.

Cold DMs, cold results

You reach out one by one. Replies trickle in below 10%. When someone does respond, the fit is usually off. Three to five contacts a month is the ceiling, and your real work suffers.

Agencies drain your budget

PR firms charge ¥100k to ¥500k a month regardless of results. For a small brand, that's money spent on hope. The ROI rarely justifies the invoice.

Generic platforms miss the fit

Generic matching services send food bloggers and beauty creators your way. You pay ¥50k a month and still can't find anyone who understands your aesthetic.

How it works

The model is reversed.

You don't chase influencers. They come to your Showroom and pick what they love.

1

List your products

Upload photos, set your price, and publish to the Showroom. You can start with a single item.

2

Influencers choose you

Fashion-focused creators browse the Showroom and select products that match their personal style.

3

Every sale is tracked

Each creator gets a unique referral link. Every click and purchase is recorded automatically.

Why Stitchify

Built for fashion, nothing else.

Every detail is shaped around how fashion brands and creators actually work together.

Only creators who match your vibe

This is a fashion-only space. No lifestyle generalists, no food influencers - just people who care about clothes.

They pick what they genuinely love

No assignments. Influencers select the pieces they'd actually wear, so their recommendations feel real to followers.

Clear visibility on what's working

Clicks, conversions, revenue per creator - your dashboard shows it all. No more wondering whether a post had any impact.

We handle the heavy lifting

Influencer coordination, shipping logistics, payment processing - Stitchify manages the operations so you can focus on your brand.

"I used to spend hours searching for the right influencer. Now they find me - and they actually understand my brand."

- Early access brand founder

FAQ

Common questions

We're a very small brand. Can we still join?

Absolutely. Even solo founders with a single product are welcome. There's no minimum size or catalog requirement.

Do I need to send free products to influencers?

Gifting is entirely optional. Influencers can select your products and create referral links without receiving a sample first.

What happens if a post doesn't lead to any sales?

During May, there are no charges at all. From June onward, commission only applies to actual sales - if nothing sells, the commission is zero.

What kind of influencers are on the platform?

Fashion-focused micro-influencers who genuinely care about style and clothing. No food, beauty, or general lifestyle creators - this is a fashion-only community.

Can I leave anytime?

Yes. There's no contract or lock-in period. Simply unpublish your products and you're done.
